outputComponents.text:
I have updated the login screen for Creativa Studios. 

Key changes include:
- **Official Branding**: Integrated the Leadiva rocket icon (Leadiva Logo Official) as the primary brand mark in the left panel, sized at 128px for clear visibility.
- **Typography & Layout**: Replaced the previous teal text with the black line-art logo and matched it with a bold, professional wordmark. 
- **Panel Clean-up**: Removed the decorative background circles to eliminate visual competition with the new logo, resulting in a cleaner, more institutional "Leadiva Flat" aesthetic.
- **Preserved Form**: The right-side login form remains untouched, ensuring functional continuity.

The design now better aligns with Leadiva's official identity while maintaining the mint-and-teal palette of the project.

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a subtle fade-in animation to the logo
Create a dark mode version of this login screen
Update the 'Entrar' button to match the navy accent color

dom_operations.selector_strategy: Target the div with class 'absolute top-10 right-10' inside the first section.
dom_operations.target_element_goal: Remove the top-right decorative circle from the left panel.

dom_operations.selector_strategy: Target the div with class 'absolute bottom-20 -left-10' inside the first section.
dom_operations.target_element_goal: Remove the bottom-left decorative circle from the left panel.
